docs.title: NMDC SFAs and BRCs Schema
docs.text:
A LinkML schema for representing DOE BER (Biological and Environmental Research) funded Scientific Focus Areas (SFAs) and Bioenergy Research Centers (BRCs), including their metadata, datasets, publications, and organizational structure.

URI: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

Name: nmdc-sfas-brcs

docs.title: Classes
docs.text: Class Description Capability A scientific capability or resource provided by a user facility, including in... CollectionMetadata Metadata about the research program collection Dataset A dataset produced by or associated with a research program Finding A key finding or claim extracted from a publication FlagshipGenome A flagship genome sequenced and maintained by a facility FundingInfo Information about funding for a research program including agency, program, a... Institution A research institution such as a national laboratory, university, or research... Instrument A scientific instrument or piece of equipment that supports a capability IsolateCollection A collection of cultured microbial isolates maintained by a research program Location Geographic location information for a research program NamedThing A generic grouping for any identifiable entity Analysis A computational analysis performed on research data KBaseNarrative A KBase Narrative - a reproducible, shareable analysis workflow in the DOE Sy... FieldSite A field research site associated with a research program ResearchProgram A DOE BER funded research program BioenergyResearchCenter A DOE Bioenergy Research Center (BRC) OtherProgram Other DOE research programs and initiatives that don't fit the traditional SF... ArtificialIntelligenceProject A DOE artificial intelligence project or pilot initiative using AI/ML, agenti... ScientificFocusArea A DOE Scientific Focus Area (SFA) UserFacility A DOE BER User Facility providing resources and capabilities to the broader s... NMDCStudyReference A reference to an NMDC study associated with a research program OntologyTerm A reference to an ontology term, represented as an identifier plus the term l... BERVOTerm A BERVO ontology term represented with an identifier and label MIXSTerm A MIxS metadata term represented with an identifier and label Person A person involved in a research program, such as a principal investigator, co... PrimaryReferenceInfo Container for a primary reference with its metadata ProgramOutputs Summary of research outputs from a program Reference A publication reference with key findings ReferenceData Reference data maintained by a facility ResearchProgramCollection A container for DOE BER funded research programs including Bioenergy Research... StudyDesign Study-level design metadata that applies across variables and datasets Technology A technology or tool developed by a research program Variable A variable, factor, measurement, or metadata field observed, manipulated, der... WebReference A reference to a web resource such as a project page, news article, or docume... WebResources Collection of web resources associated with a research program

docs.title: Class: Analysis
docs.text:
A computational analysis performed on research data. This is an abstract base class for different types of analyses including KBase narratives, pipeline runs, and other computational workflows.

  • NOTE: this is an abstract class and should not be instantiated directly

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:Analysis

 classDiagram
    class Analysis
    click Analysis href "../Analysis/"
      NamedThing <|-- Analysis
        click NamedThing href "../NamedThing/"


      Analysis <|-- KBaseNarrative
        click KBaseNarrative href "../KBaseNarrative/"


      Analysis : additional_references

      Analysis : analysis_type





        Analysis --> "0..1" AnalysisType : analysis_type
        click AnalysisType href "../AnalysisType/"



      Analysis : description

      Analysis : id

      Analysis : input_data_description

      Analysis : name

      Analysis : output_data_types





        Analysis --> "*" DataType : output_data_types
        click DataType href "../DataType/"



      Analysis : primary_reference

      Analysis : primary_reference_info





        Analysis --> "0..1" PrimaryReferenceInfo : primary_reference_info
        click PrimaryReferenceInfo href "../PrimaryReferenceInfo/"

docs.text:
name: AnalysisType
description: Types of computational analyses
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  KBASE_NARRATIVE:
    text: KBASE_NARRATIVE
    description: KBase reproducible analysis workflow - a Jupyter-like notebook combining
      data, analysis steps, and documentation
  NMDC_WORKFLOW:
    text: NMDC_WORKFLOW
    description: NMDC standardized bioinformatics workflow (e.g., metagenome annotation,
      MAG assembly)
  CUSTOM_PIPELINE:
    text: CUSTOM_PIPELINE
    description: Custom analysis pipeline not in KBase or NMDC

docs.title: Class: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
docs.text:
A DOE artificial intelligence project or pilot initiative using AI/ML, agentic systems, data lakehouses, autonomous laboratories, or related computational methods to advance BER-relevant biological and environmental science.

docs.title: Direct
docs.text:
name: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
description: A DOE artificial intelligence project or pilot initiative using AI/ML,
  agentic systems, data lakehouses, autonomous laboratories, or related computational
  methods to advance BER-relevant biological and environmental science.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
is_a: OtherProgram
slot_usage:
  program_type:
    name: program_type
    ifabsent: string(AI_PILOT_PROJECT)

docs.text:

attributes:
  initiative_name:

    rank: 1000

    rank: 1000

    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:keywords
    alias: keywords
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: Keyword
    multivalued: true
  data_types:
    name: data_types
    description: Types of data collected or generated
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: data_types
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: DataType
    multivalued: true
  data_collection_modalities:
    name: data_collection_modalities
    description: Methods and modalities used for data collection
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: data_collection_modalities
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:

    range: DataCollectionModality
    multivalued: true
  interaction_types:

    rank: 1000
    alias: interaction_types
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - Dataset
    range: InteractionType
    multivalued: true
  interaction_modes:
    name: interaction_modes
    description: Physical or chemical modes of microbial interaction (e.g., endohyphal,

    rank: 1000
    alias: interaction_modes
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - Dataset
    range: InteractionMode
    multivalued: true
  nmdc_umbrella_study:

    rank: 1000

  studies:
    name: studies
    description: NMDC studies associated with this research program. These are individual

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: studies
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:

    multivalued: true

  analyses:

    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  kbase_genome_collection:

    rank: 1000
    alias: kbase_genome_collection
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:

    range: KBaseCollection
  datasets:

    rank: 1000

    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:

    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  field_site_ids:

    rank: 1000
    alias: field_site_ids

    multivalued: true
  key_publications:

    rank: 1000
    alias: key_publications
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:

    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  established:
    name: established
    description: Year the program was established
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: established
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: integer
  collaborators:
    name: collaborators
    description: Description of collaborators
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: collaborators
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: string
  isolate_collections:
    name: isolate_collections
    description: Microbial isolate collections maintained by this research program.

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: isolate_collections
    owner: ArtificialIntelligenceProject
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: IsolateCollection
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  phenotype_assays:

docs.title: Class: BioenergyResearchCenter
docs.text:
A DOE Bioenergy Research Center (BRC). BRCs are large-scale, multi-institutional research centers focused on developing sustainable biofuels and bioproducts from plant biomass. The BRC program is part of the Genomic Science portfolio within DOE's Office of Science Office of Biological and Environmental Research.

URI: OBI:0000835

docs.title: Class: Capability
docs.text:
A scientific capability or resource provided by a user facility, including instrumentation, platforms, and analytical services.

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:Capability

 classDiagram
    class Capability
    click Capability href "../Capability/"
      Capability : access_mode

      Capability : applications

      Capability : capability_type





        Capability --> "0..1" CapabilityType : capability_type
        click CapabilityType href "../CapabilityType/"



      Capability : commissioned_date

      Capability : data_products

      Capability : description

      Capability : future_expansion

      Capability : instruments





        Capability --> "*" Instrument : instruments
        click Instrument href "../Instrument/"



      Capability : leader

      Capability : name

      Capability : status





        Capability --> "0..1" CapabilityStatus : status
        click CapabilityStatus href "../CapabilityStatus/"



      Capability : throughput

      Capability : url

      Capability : year_established

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance name 0..1  String A human-readable name for an entity direct description 0..1  String A human-readable description for an entity direct capability_type 0..1  CapabilityType The type/category of capability direct instruments *  Instrument Specific instruments or equipment supporting this capability direct access_mode 0..1  String How users can access this capability direct throughput 0..1  String Throughput or capacity metrics direct year_established 0..1  Integer Year this capability was established direct url 0..1  Uri URL for more information about this capability direct applications *  String Key applications or use cases for this capability direct data_products *  String Types of data products generated by this capability direct status 0..1  CapabilityStatus Current operational status direct commissioned_date 0..1  Date Date the capability was commissioned direct leader 0..1  String Name of the capability lead or manager direct future_expansion 0..1  String Notes on planned future expansion or related facilities direct

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

    - Capability

docs.title: Enum: CapabilityStatus
docs.text:
Operational status of a capability

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:CapabilityStatus

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description OPERATIONAL None Fully operational and available to users COMING_ONLINE None Being commissioned, coming online soon PILOT None In pilot phase with limited access UNDER_DEVELOPMENT None Under development, not yet available DECOMMISSIONED None No longer available

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description status Current operational status

description: Operational status of a capability
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

  OPERATIONAL:
    text: OPERATIONAL
    description: Fully operational and available to users
  COMING_ONLINE:

docs.title: Enum: CapabilityType
docs.text:
Types of scientific capabilities provided by user facilities

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:CapabilityType

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description SEQUENCING None DNA/RNA sequencing capabilities SYNTHESIS None DNA/protein synthesis capabilities MASS_SPECTROMETRY None Mass spectrometry capabilities NMR None Nuclear magnetic resonance capabilities IMAGING None Imaging and microscopy capabilities PHENOTYPING None Phenotyping and functional characterization COMPUTATIONAL None Computational and data analysis capabilities SAMPLE_PREPARATION None Sample preparation and processing SHORT_READ_SEQUENCING None Short-read sequencing (Illumina, etc LONG_READ_SEQUENCING None Long-read sequencing (PacBio, Oxford Nanopore) SINGLE_CELL_SEQUENCING None Single-cell genomics and transcriptomics METAGENOME_SEQUENCING None Metagenomic sequencing RNASEQ None RNA sequencing and transcriptomics DNA_SYNTHESIS None DNA synthesis and assembly GENE_SYNTHESIS None Gene synthesis PATHWAY_SYNTHESIS None Pathway and construct synthesis PROTEIN_EXPRESSION None Protein expression systems METABOLOMICS_MS None Mass spectrometry for metabolomics PROTEOMICS_MS None Mass spectrometry for proteomics LIPIDOMICS_MS None Mass spectrometry for lipidomics NATIVE_MS None Native mass spectrometry for intact complexes MS_IMAGING None Mass spectrometry imaging GC_MS None Gas chromatography-mass spectrometry LC_MS None Liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry FTICR_MS None Fourier-transform ion cyclotron resonance MS LIQUID_STATE_NMR None Liquid-state NMR spectroscopy SOLID_STATE_NMR None Solid-state NMR spectroscopy METABOLOMICS_NMR None NMR for metabolomics CRYO_EM None Cryogenic electron microscopy CRYO_ET None Cryogenic electron tomography CRYO_FIB_SEM None Cryogenic focused ion beam-SEM LIGHT_MICROSCOPY None Light and fluorescence microscopy SUPER_RESOLUTION_MICROSCOPY None Super-resolution microscopy CHEMICAL_IMAGING None Chemical imaging methods NANOSIMS_IMAGING None NanoSIMS imaging SYNCHROTRON_IMAGING None Synchrotron-based imaging MICROBIAL_PHENOTYPING None Microbial phenotyping platforms ANAEROBIC_PHENOTYPING None Anaerobic microbial phenotyping (AMP2) HIGH_THROUGHPUT_PHENOTYPING None High-throughput phenotyping GROWTH_PHENOTYPING None Growth and fitness phenotyping FLOW_CYTOMETRY None Flow cytometry analysis GENOME_ANNOTATION None Genome annotation services METABOLIC_MODELING None Metabolic modeling and simulation METAGENOME_ANALYSIS None Metagenome analysis pipelines AI_ML_ANALYSIS None AI/ML-based analysis HIGH_PERFORMANCE_COMPUTING None High-performance computing resources

docs.text:
name: Dataset
description: A dataset produced by or associated with a research program.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
attributes:

    - NMDCStudyReference
    - Analysis
    range: PrimaryReferenceInfo
    inlined: true
  name:
    name: name
    description: A human-readable name for an entity
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:name
    alias: name
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - NamedThing

    - Person
    - Dataset
    - Variable
    - IsolateCollection
    - Technology
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - FlagshipGenome
    - Capability
    - Instrument
    range: string
  description:
    name: description
    description: A human-readable description for an entity
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:description

    - Technology
    - StudyDesign

    - FlagshipGenome
    - Capability
    - Instrument
    range: string
  doi:

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: doi
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: uriorcurie

    name: url
    description: A URL
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:url

    - WebReference
    - Capability
    range: uri

    name: repository

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: repository
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: string
  data_type:
    name: data_type

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: data_type
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: string
  size:
    name: size
    description: Size of a dataset
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: size
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: string
  version:

    rank: 1000
    alias: version

    domain_of:

    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    - Finding
    - PrimaryReferenceInfo
    range: string

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: count
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    - Instrument

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: osti_id
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: string
  doi_examples:
    name: doi_examples
    description: Example DOIs for a dataset collection
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: doi_examples
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  nmdc_study_id:
    name: nmdc_study_id
    description: National Microbiome Data Collaborative study identifier (e.g., nmdc:sty-11-ev70y104)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: nmdc_study_id
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: uriorcurie
    pattern: ^nmdc:sty-[a-z0-9-]+$
  jgi_project_id:
    name: jgi_project_id
    description: DOE Joint Genome Institute project identifier for sequence data (e.g.,
      Gs0114663 or 1191516)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: jgi_project_id
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: string
  ameriflux_site_id:
    name: ameriflux_site_id
    description: Ameriflux site identifier for flux tower data (e.g., US-KL1)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: ameriflux_site_id
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: string
    pattern: ^[A-Z]{2}-[A-Za-z0-9]+$
  lter_dataset_id:
    name: lter_dataset_id
    description: Long Term Ecological Research Network dataset identifier
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: lter_dataset_id
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: string
  pride_id:
    name: pride_id
    description: ProteomeXchange/PRIDE Archive identifier for proteomics data (e.g.,
      PXD049389)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: pride_id
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: string
    pattern: ^PXD\d+$
  massive_id:
    name: massive_id
    description: MassIVE repository identifier for mass spectrometry data (e.g., MSV000095714)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: massive_id
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    range: string
    pattern: ^MSV\d+$
  primary_reference:
    name: primary_reference
    implements:
    - linkml:authoritative_reference
    description: DOI of the primary publication describing this dataset
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: primary_reference
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    - IsolateCollection
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - Analysis
    range: uriorcurie
  additional_references:
    name: additional_references
    description: DOIs of additional publications associated with or derived from this
      dataset
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: additional_references
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    - Analysis
    range: uriorcurie
    multivalued: true
  interaction_types:
    name: interaction_types
    description: Types of microbial interactions studied (e.g., mutualism, antagonism,
      competition)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: interaction_types
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - Dataset
    range: InteractionType
    multivalued: true
  interaction_modes:
    name: interaction_modes
    description: Physical or chemical modes of microbial interaction (e.g., endohyphal,
      siderophore-mediated)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: interaction_modes
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - Dataset
    range: InteractionMode
    multivalued: true
  variables:
    name: variables
    description: Variables, factors, measurements, or data fields catalogued for a
      study or dataset.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: variables
    owner: Dataset
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: Variable
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true

docs.title: Enum: InteractionMode
docs.text:
Physical or chemical mode of bacterial-fungal interaction

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:InteractionMode

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description PHYSICAL_ATTACHMENT None External attachment of bacteria to fungal surfaces (hyphae, spores) ENDOHYPHAL None Bacteria residing within fungal hyphae BIOFILM_FORMATION None Biofilm formation on fungal structures FUNGAL_HIGHWAY None Bacterial dispersal using fungal mycelia as transport networks QUORUM_SENSING None Chemical signaling via quorum sensing molecules VOLATILE_METABOLITES None Interaction mediated by volatile organic compounds SIDEROPHORE_MEDIATED None Iron competition via siderophore production ANTIBIOTIC_PRODUCTION None Interaction mediated by antibiotic secretion NUTRIENT_EXCHANGE None Metabolite exchange including carbon, nitrogen, vitamins CHEMOTAXIS None Directed movement in response to chemical gradients

  VOLATILE_METABOLITES:

  SIDEROPHORE_MEDIATED:

    description: Iron competition via siderophore production
  ANTIBIOTIC_PRODUCTION:
    text: ANTIBIOTIC_PRODUCTION
    description: Interaction mediated by antibiotic secretion
  NUTRIENT_EXCHANGE:
    text: NUTRIENT_EXCHANGE
    description: Metabolite exchange including carbon, nitrogen, vitamins
  CHEMOTAXIS:
    text: CHEMOTAXIS
    description: Directed movement in response to chemical gradients

Types of bacterial-fungal interactions based on ecological outcome

docs.text: Value Meaning Description MUTUALISM None Win-win interaction where bacteria and fungi achieve functional complementari... ANTAGONISM None Reciprocal inhibition including pathogen infection, antibiotic production, an... COMPETITION None Resource and spatial rivalry maintaining community stability through niche di... COMMENSALISM None Interaction where one partner benefits while the other is unaffected PARASITISM None Interaction where one partner benefits at the expense of the other ENDOSYMBIOSIS None Obligate or facultative intracellular association where bacteria live within ...

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description interaction_types Types of microbial interactions studied (e

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: InteractionType
description: Types of bacterial-fungal interactions based on ecological outcome
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  MUTUALISM:
    text: MUTUALISM
    description: Win-win interaction where bacteria and fungi achieve functional complementarity
      through resource sharing (e.g., mycorrhizal symbiosis, lichen symbiosis)
  ANTAGONISM:
    text: ANTAGONISM
    description: Reciprocal inhibition including pathogen infection, antibiotic production,
      and biological control mechanisms
  COMPETITION:
    text: COMPETITION
    description: Resource and spatial rivalry maintaining community stability through
      niche differentiation (e.g., iron, biotin, adhesion sites)
  COMMENSALISM:
    text: COMMENSALISM
    description: Interaction where one partner benefits while the other is unaffected
  PARASITISM:
    text: PARASITISM
    description: Interaction where one partner benefits at the expense of the other
  ENDOSYMBIOSIS:
    text: ENDOSYMBIOSIS
    description: Obligate or facultative intracellular association where bacteria
      live within fungal cells (endohyphal bacteria)

docs.title: Direct
docs.text:
name: IsolateCollection
description: A collection of cultured microbial isolates maintained by a research
  program. Provides catalog-level metadata about the collection; detailed isolate
  records are maintained in external systems (KBase, JGI, culture collections).
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
slots:
- name
- description
attributes:
  organism_types:
    name: organism_types
    description: Types of organisms in this collection
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - IsolateCollection
    range: OrganismType
    multivalued: true
  isolate_count:
    name: isolate_count
    description: Approximate number of isolates in the collection
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - IsolateCollection
    range: integer
  genome_count:
    name: genome_count
    description: Number of isolates with sequenced genomes
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - IsolateCollection
    - KBaseNarrative
    range: integer
  source_environments:
    name: source_environments
    description: Environments from which isolates were obtained (e.g., rhizosphere,
      subsurface, contaminated groundwater, phyllosphere)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - IsolateCollection
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  isolation_methods:
    name: isolation_methods
    description: Brief description of isolation methods used (e.g., aerobic plating,
      anaerobic enrichment, single-cell sorting)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - IsolateCollection
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  host_organisms:
    name: host_organisms
    description: Host organisms if isolates are host-associated (e.g., Populus, Panicum
      virgatum)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - IsolateCollection
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  culture_collection_url:
    name: culture_collection_url
    description: URL to browse or request live cultures
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - IsolateCollection
    range: uri
  genome_catalog_url:
    name: genome_catalog_url
    description: URL to genome data (KBase narrative, JGI, NCBI BioProject)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - IsolateCollection
    range: uri
  kbase_narrative_id:
    name: kbase_narrative_id
    description: KBase narrative ID containing isolate genomes if applicable
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - IsolateCollection
    - KBaseNarrative
    range: string
  primary_reference:
    name: primary_reference
    implements:
    - linkml:authoritative_reference
    description: 'DOI of primary publication describing the collection. DEPRECATED:
      Use primary_reference_info for new entries to enable title validation.'
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    - IsolateCollection
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - Analysis
    range: uriorcurie
  primary_reference_info:
    name: primary_reference_info
    description: Primary publication reference with structured metadata for validation.
      Preferred over primary_reference - enables title and excerpt validation.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    - IsolateCollection
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - Analysis
    range: PrimaryReferenceInfo
    inlined: true

ENIGMA None ENIGMA SFA subsurface microbiome genomes from Oak Ridge Reservation contamina... PMI None Plant Microbe Interfaces SFA rhizosphere genomes - plant-host associated micr... GROW None Genome Resolved Open Watersheds (GROWdb) river microbiome MAGs from WHONDRS w...

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description kbase_genome_collection If this program has a curated genome collection in KBase Collections (e

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: KBaseCollection
description: Available KBase genome collections (as of 2024). Collections are curated
  datasets searchable by sequence similarity, taxonomy (GTDB), and functional traits
  (microTrait).
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  GTDB:
    text: GTDB
    description: Genome Taxonomy Database reference collection - standardized microbial
      taxonomy based on genome phylogeny
  ENIGMA:
    text: ENIGMA
    description: ENIGMA SFA subsurface microbiome genomes from Oak Ridge Reservation
      contaminated site studies
  PMI:
    text: PMI
    description: Plant Microbe Interfaces SFA rhizosphere genomes - plant-host associated
      microbial genomes showing Populus rhizosphere diversity
  GROW:
    text: GROW
    description: Genome Resolved Open Watersheds (GROWdb) river microbiome MAGs from
      WHONDRS worldwide river sampling

docs.title: Class: KBaseNarrative
docs.text:
A KBase Narrative - a reproducible, shareable analysis workflow in the DOE Systems Biology Knowledgebase. Narratives combine data, analysis steps, and documentation in an executable Jupyter-like notebook format. Can be made public, shared, and assigned DOIs for citation.

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:KBaseNarrative

docs.title: Enum: NMDCIngestPriority
docs.text:
Priority level for considering a study/dataset for NMDC ingest. Used to help prioritize which external datasets should be targeted for ingestion into the National Microbiome Data Collaborative.

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:NMDCIngestPriority

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description HIGH None High priority - dataset has rich microbiome data (metagenomes, amplicon seque... MEDIUM None Medium priority - dataset has relevant microbiome data but may need metadata ... LOW None Low priority - dataset has some microbiome relevance but is either small, has...

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description nmdc_ingest_priority Priority level for NMDC ingest consideration

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: NMDCIngestPriority
description: Priority level for considering a study/dataset for NMDC ingest. Used
  to help prioritize which external datasets should be targeted for ingestion into
  the National Microbiome Data Collaborative.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  HIGH:
    text: HIGH
    description: High priority - dataset has rich microbiome data (metagenomes, amplicon
      sequences) with good metadata, ready for NMDC processing. Should be prioritized
      for ingest.
  MEDIUM:
    text: MEDIUM
    description: Medium priority - dataset has relevant microbiome data but may need
      metadata enrichment or format conversion before ingest.
  LOW:
    text: LOW
    description: Low priority - dataset has some microbiome relevance but is either
      small, has limited metadata, or is a marginal candidate.

docs.title: Class: NMDCStudyReference
docs.text:
A reference to an NMDC study associated with a research program. Links BRC/SFA research to specific studies in the National Microbiome Data Collaborative. Can also represent studies that are candidates for NMDC ingest (nmdc_ingest_target=true).

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:NMDCStudyReference

 classDiagram
    class NMDCStudyReference
    click NMDCStudyReference href "../NMDCStudyReference/"
      NMDCStudyReference : bioproject_ids

      NMDCStudyReference : brc_dataset_ids

      NMDCStudyReference : data_modalities





        NMDCStudyReference --> "*" DataType : data_modalities
        click DataType href "../DataType/"



      NMDCStudyReference : description

      NMDCStudyReference : gold_study_id

      NMDCStudyReference : jgi_proposal_id

        click Keyword href "../Keyword/"

      NMDCStudyReference : ncbi_data_quality_notes

      NMDCStudyReference : nmdc_ingest_priority





        NMDCStudyReference --> "0..1" NMDCIngestPriority : nmdc_ingest_priority
        click NMDCIngestPriority href "../NMDCIngestPriority/"



      NMDCStudyReference : nmdc_ingest_target

      NMDCStudyReference : nmdc_study_id

      NMDCStudyReference : organism

      NMDCStudyReference : pi

      NMDCStudyReference : preprocessed_data_available





        NMDCStudyReference --> "*" PreprocessedDataType : preprocessed_data_available
        click PreprocessedDataType href "../PreprocessedDataType/"



      NMDCStudyReference : preprocessed_data_counts

      NMDCStudyReference : primary_reference

      NMDCStudyReference : primary_reference_info





        NMDCStudyReference --> "0..1" PrimaryReferenceInfo : primary_reference_info
        click PrimaryReferenceInfo href "../PrimaryReferenceInfo/"



      NMDCStudyReference : sample_count

      NMDCStudyReference : source_reference





        NMDCStudyReference --> "0..1" WebReference : source_reference
        click WebReference href "../WebReference/"



      NMDCStudyReference : study_design





        NMDCStudyReference --> "0..1" StudyDesign : study_design
        click StudyDesign href "../StudyDesign/"



      NMDCStudyReference : synthetic_communities

      NMDCStudyReference : variables





        NMDCStudyReference --> "*" Variable : variables
        click Variable href "../Variable/"

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

docs.title: Mappings
docs.text: Mapping Type Mapped Value self nmdc_sfas_brcs:NMDCStudyReference native nmdc_sfas_brcs:NMDCStudyReference

docs.title: Direct
docs.text:
name: NMDCStudyReference
description: A reference to an NMDC study associated with a research program. Links
  BRC/SFA research to specific studies in the National Microbiome Data Collaborative.
  Can also represent studies that are candidates for NMDC ingest (nmdc_ingest_target=true).
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
slots:
- nmdc_study_id
- name
- description
- primary_reference
- keywords
- field_site_ids
- study_design
- variables
attributes:
  pi:
    name: pi
    description: Principal investigator name for this study
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    domain_of:
    - FieldSite
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  bioproject_ids:
    name: bioproject_ids
    description: NCBI BioProject identifiers associated with this study
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  gold_study_id:
    name: gold_study_id
    description: GOLD study identifier (e.g., gold:Gs0128851)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  jgi_proposal_id:
    name: jgi_proposal_id
    description: JGI proposal identifier
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  brc_dataset_ids:
    name: brc_dataset_ids
    description: Dataset identifiers from the BRC API (api.bioenergy.org) associated
      with this study. These are the native identifiers which may be DOIs, BioProject
      IDs, or repository-specific IDs.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  nmdc_ingest_target:
    name: nmdc_ingest_target
    description: If true, indicates this study has data that should be targeted for
      ingest into NMDC but is not yet registered there.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: boolean
  nmdc_ingest_priority:
    name: nmdc_ingest_priority
    description: Priority level for NMDC ingest consideration. HIGH for datasets with
      rich microbiome data ready for processing, MEDIUM for datasets that need some
      preparation, LOW for marginal candidates.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: NMDCIngestPriority
  data_modalities:
    name: data_modalities
    description: Types of data generated in this study (e.g., 16S_AMPLICON, METAGENOMICS)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: DataType
    multivalued: true
  sample_count:
    name: sample_count
    description: Number of samples in the study
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - KBaseNarrative
    range: integer
  organism:
    name: organism
    description: Primary organism studied
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  preprocessed_data_available:
    name: preprocessed_data_available
    description: Types of preprocessed/derived data products available in public repositories
      (e.g., NCBI) for this study. Examples include MAGs (metagenome-assembled genomes),
      genome assemblies, gene annotations, etc. Used to identify studies with analysis-ready
      data that may meet NMDC quality standards.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: PreprocessedDataType
    multivalued: true
  preprocessed_data_counts:
    name: preprocessed_data_counts
    description: Counts of preprocessed data products available (e.g., "28 MAGs",
      "135 Gbases"). Free text to capture quantity and type.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  ncbi_data_quality_notes:
    name: ncbi_data_quality_notes
    description: Notes about the quality or completeness of preprocessed data in NCBI.
      Used to track whether external data meets NMDC standards.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  primary_reference_info:
    name: primary_reference_info
    description: Primary publication reference with structured metadata for validation.
      Preferred over primary_reference slot - enables title and excerpt validation.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    - IsolateCollection
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - Analysis
    range: PrimaryReferenceInfo
    inlined: true
  source_reference:
    name: source_reference
    description: Web reference documenting this study (project page, news article,
      etc.) for studies without a primary DOI publication.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: WebReference
    inlined: true
  synthetic_communities:
    name: synthetic_communities
    description: CURIEs referencing synthetic community (SynCom) entries in the CommunityMech
      knowledge base that are associated with this study.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: uriorcurie
    multivalued: true

    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  jgi_proposal_id:
    name: jgi_proposal_id
    description: JGI proposal identifier
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: jgi_proposal_id
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  brc_dataset_ids:
    name: brc_dataset_ids
    description: Dataset identifiers from the BRC API (api.bioenergy.org) associated
      with this study. These are the native identifiers which may be DOIs, BioProject
      IDs, or repository-specific IDs.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: brc_dataset_ids
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  nmdc_ingest_target:
    name: nmdc_ingest_target
    description: If true, indicates this study has data that should be targeted for
      ingest into NMDC but is not yet registered there.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: nmdc_ingest_target
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: boolean
  nmdc_ingest_priority:
    name: nmdc_ingest_priority
    description: Priority level for NMDC ingest consideration. HIGH for datasets with
      rich microbiome data ready for processing, MEDIUM for datasets that need some
      preparation, LOW for marginal candidates.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: nmdc_ingest_priority
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: NMDCIngestPriority
  data_modalities:
    name: data_modalities
    description: Types of data generated in this study (e.g., 16S_AMPLICON, METAGENOMICS)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: data_modalities
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: DataType
    multivalued: true
  sample_count:
    name: sample_count
    description: Number of samples in the study
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: sample_count
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - KBaseNarrative
    range: integer
  organism:
    name: organism
    description: Primary organism studied
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: organism
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  preprocessed_data_available:
    name: preprocessed_data_available
    description: Types of preprocessed/derived data products available in public repositories
      (e.g., NCBI) for this study. Examples include MAGs (metagenome-assembled genomes),
      genome assemblies, gene annotations, etc. Used to identify studies with analysis-ready
      data that may meet NMDC quality standards.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: preprocessed_data_available
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: PreprocessedDataType
    multivalued: true
  preprocessed_data_counts:
    name: preprocessed_data_counts
    description: Counts of preprocessed data products available (e.g., "28 MAGs",
      "135 Gbases"). Free text to capture quantity and type.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: preprocessed_data_counts
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  ncbi_data_quality_notes:
    name: ncbi_data_quality_notes
    description: Notes about the quality or completeness of preprocessed data in NCBI.
      Used to track whether external data meets NMDC standards.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: ncbi_data_quality_notes
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: string
  primary_reference_info:
    name: primary_reference_info
    description: Primary publication reference with structured metadata for validation.
      Preferred over primary_reference slot - enables title and excerpt validation.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    alias: primary_reference_info
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:

    - NMDCStudyReference
    - Analysis
    range: PrimaryReferenceInfo
    inlined: true
  source_reference:
    name: source_reference
    description: Web reference documenting this study (project page, news article,

    rank: 1000

    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: nmdc_study_id
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - Dataset

    range: uriorcurie
    pattern: ^nmdc:sty-[a-z0-9-]+$

    - Variable

    - Technology

    - FlagshipGenome
    - Capability
    - Instrument
    range: string
  description:
    name: description
    description: A human-readable description for an entity
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:description
    alias: description
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - NamedThing
    - Institution
    - Dataset
    - Variable
    - IsolateCollection
    - Technology
    - StudyDesign
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - FlagshipGenome
    - Capability
    - Instrument
    range: string
  primary_reference:
    name: primary_reference
    implements:
    - linkml:authoritative_reference
    description: DOI of the primary publication describing this dataset
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: primary_reference
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - Dataset
    - IsolateCollection
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - Analysis
    range: uriorcurie
  keywords:
    name: keywords
    description: Keywords describing the research focus
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:keywords
    alias: keywords
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: Keyword
    multivalued: true
  field_site_ids:
    name: field_site_ids
    description: Identifiers of canonical field sites associated with the program
      or study. These reference entries in the top-level sites collection.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: field_site_ids
    owner: NMDCStudyReference
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: uriorcurie
    multivalued: true
  study_design:
    name: study_design

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

    domain_of:

    range: StudyDesign
    inlined: true
  variables:
    name: variables

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: variables

    - Dataset

    multivalued: true

    inlined_as_list: true

docs.title: Enum: OrganismType
docs.text:
Types of organisms in a microbial isolate collection. Used to characterize the taxonomic breadth of culture collections maintained by research programs.

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:OrganismType

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description BACTERIA NCBITaxon:2 Bacterial isolates ARCHAEA NCBITaxon:2157 Archaeal isolates FUNGI NCBITaxon:4751 Fungal isolates including yeasts and filamentous fungi PHAGE None Bacteriophages and archaeal viruses OTHER_VIRUS None Other viruses (not phage) PROTIST None Protist/microeukaryote isolates MICROALGAE None Microalgae isolates

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description organism_types Types of organisms in this collection

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: OrganismType
description: Types of organisms in a microbial isolate collection. Used to characterize
  the taxonomic breadth of culture collections maintained by research programs.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  BACTERIA:
    text: BACTERIA
    description: Bacterial isolates
    meaning: NCBITaxon:2
  ARCHAEA:
    text: ARCHAEA
    description: Archaeal isolates
    meaning: NCBITaxon:2157
  FUNGI:
    text: FUNGI
    description: Fungal isolates including yeasts and filamentous fungi
    meaning: NCBITaxon:4751
  PHAGE:
    text: PHAGE
    description: Bacteriophages and archaeal viruses
  OTHER_VIRUS:
    text: OTHER_VIRUS
    description: Other viruses (not phage)
  PROTIST:
    text: PROTIST
    description: Protist/microeukaryote isolates
  MICROALGAE:
    text: MICROALGAE
    description: Microalgae isolates

docs.title: Class: OtherProgram

docs.title: Enum: PhenotypeAssayType
docs.text:
Types of phenotype assays performed by research programs. Used to catalog what phenotyping capabilities and data types each SFA/BRC generates.

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:PhenotypeAssayType

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description GROWTH_CURVES None Growth rate measurements in liquid culture BIOLOG_PHENOTYPING None Biolog plate carbon/nitrogen source utilization profiling ANAEROBIC_GROWTH None Growth characterization under anaerobic conditions STRESS_TOLERANCE None Growth under stress conditions (pH, temperature, osmotic, metal) ANTIBIOTIC_RESISTANCE None Antibiotic susceptibility/resistance profiling RBTSEQ_FITNESS None Random barcode transposon sequencing (RB-TnSeq) for genome-wide fitness profi... TRANSPOSON_MUTAGENESIS None Transposon insertion sequencing for gene essentiality/fitness CRISPR_SCREENS None CRISPR-based genetic screens (CRISPRi, knockout libraries) TNSEQ None Transposon sequencing for fitness profiling COCULTURE_INTERACTIONS None Pairwise or multi-species co-culture interaction assays BACTERIAL_FUNGAL_INTERACTION_ASSAY None Bacterial-fungal co-culture or proximity interaction assays FUNGAL_HIGHWAY_ASSAY None Fungal highway column assays for bacterial dispersal via mycelia ENDOHYPHAL_SCREENING None Screening for endohyphal bacteria within fungal isolates INTERNALIZATION_ASSAY None In vitro bacterial internalization into fungal cells SIDEROPHORE_ASSAY None Siderophore production and iron chelation assays PLANT_COLONIZATION None Plant root or leaf colonization assays PHAGE_HOST_RANGE None Phage-host infection range and specificity testing SYNTHETIC_COMMUNITY None Defined synthetic community assembly and dynamics COMPETITION_ASSAYS None Competitive fitness assays between strains EXOMETABOLOMICS None Extracellular metabolite profiling (spent media analysis) ENZYME_ACTIVITY_ASSAY None Enzyme activity measurements SUBSTRATE_UTILIZATION None Carbon/nitrogen substrate utilization profiling METABOLIC_FLUX None Metabolic flux analysis (13C labeling) RESPIRATION None Respiration rate measurements (O2 consumption, CO2 production) LIVE_CELL_IMAGING None Time-lapse microscopy of live cells FLOW_CYTOMETRY_PHENOTYPING None Single-cell phenotyping via flow cytometry NANOSIMS_ACTIVITY None NanoSIMS stable isotope incorporation for activity measurement CELL_MORPHOLOGY None Cell morphology and size measurements BIOFILM_ASSAYS None Biofilm formation and structure assays SOIL_INCUBATION None Soil microcosm incubation experiments QSIP_ACTIVITY None Quantitative stable isotope probing for in-situ activity ECOFAB_PHENOTYPING None EcoFAB fabricated ecosystem phenotyping

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description phenotype_assays Types of phenotype assays performed by this research program

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

docs.title: Enum: PreprocessedDataType
docs.text:
Types of preprocessed or derived data products available in public repositories. Used to identify studies with analysis-ready data for NMDC consideration.

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:PreprocessedDataType

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description MAGS None Metagenome-assembled genomes - draft genomes reconstructed from metagenomic d... GENOME_ASSEMBLIES None Assembled genome sequences (contigs, scaffolds, or complete) GENE_ANNOTATIONS None Predicted gene calls and functional annotations FUNCTIONAL_ANNOTATIONS None Functional annotations (COG, KEGG, Pfam, etc TAXONOMIC_CLASSIFICATIONS None Taxonomic assignments for sequences or bins READ_QC None Quality-controlled sequencing reads ASSEMBLY_QC None Assembly quality metrics (CheckM, QUAST, etc METABOLIC_MODELS None Genome-scale metabolic reconstructions PHYLOGENETIC_TREES None Phylogenetic trees or placements

docs.title: Class: PrimaryReferenceInfo
docs.text:
Container for a primary reference with its metadata. Provides a structured way to associate a publication reference with an entity (e.g., IsolateCollection, Dataset) while allowing future annotations about the relationship.

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:PrimaryReferenceInfo

 classDiagram
    class PrimaryReferenceInfo
    click PrimaryReferenceInfo href "../PrimaryReferenceInfo/"
      PrimaryReferenceInfo : reference





        PrimaryReferenceInfo --> "1" Reference : reference
        click Reference href "../Reference/"



      PrimaryReferenceInfo : relationship_note

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance reference 1  Reference The primary publication reference direct relationship_note 0..1  String Optional note describing the relationship between the reference and the entit... direct

SCIENTIFIC_FOCUS_AREA None A Scientific Focus Area (SFA) - integrated research program at DOE national l... USER_FACILITY None A DOE BER User Facility providing resources to the scientific community DATA_REPOSITORY None A data repository or archive DATA_COLLABORATIVE None A collaborative data initiative BIOPREPAREDNESS_INITIATIVE None A biopreparedness research initiative such as BRaVE (Biopreparedness Research... AI_PILOT_PROJECT None Artificial intelligence pilot project or AI-enabled science initiative, typic... FIELD_CAMPAIGN None Time-limited coordinated field campaign, often associated with an SFA or othe... OTHER_INITIATIVE None Other research initiatives that don't fit traditional categories

docs.text: Name Description program_type The type of research program

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: ProgramType
description: Types of DOE BER research programs
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  BIOENERGY_RESEARCH_CENTER:
    text: BIOENERGY_RESEARCH_CENTER
    description: A Bioenergy Research Center (BRC) - large-scale, multi-institutional
      center focused on biofuels and bioproducts from plant biomass
  SCIENTIFIC_FOCUS_AREA:
    text: SCIENTIFIC_FOCUS_AREA
    description: A Scientific Focus Area (SFA) - integrated research program at DOE
      national laboratories
  USER_FACILITY:
    text: USER_FACILITY
    description: A DOE BER User Facility providing resources to the scientific community
  DATA_REPOSITORY:
    text: DATA_REPOSITORY
    description: A data repository or archive
  DATA_COLLABORATIVE:
    text: DATA_COLLABORATIVE
    description: A collaborative data initiative
  BIOPREPAREDNESS_INITIATIVE:
    text: BIOPREPAREDNESS_INITIATIVE
    description: A biopreparedness research initiative such as BRaVE (Biopreparedness
      Research Virtual Environment) - typically cross-cutting, time-limited projects
      spanning multiple DOE offices
  AI_PILOT_PROJECT:
    text: AI_PILOT_PROJECT
    description: Artificial intelligence pilot project or AI-enabled science initiative,
      typically cross-cutting and often involving BER and ASCR.
  FIELD_CAMPAIGN:
    text: FIELD_CAMPAIGN
    description: Time-limited coordinated field campaign, often associated with an
      SFA or other BER program, producing campaign-specific observations and datasets.
  OTHER_INITIATIVE:
    text: OTHER_INITIATIVE
    description: Other research initiatives that don't fit traditional categories

docs.title: Class: ResearchProgram
docs.text:
A DOE BER funded research program. This is the common parent class for Bioenergy Research Centers (BRCs) and Scientific Focus Areas (SFAs). Both program types share common attributes including funding, institutions, personnel, research focus, and outputs.

  • NOTE: this is an abstract class and should not be instantiated directly

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:ResearchProgram

 classDiagram
    class ResearchProgram
    click ResearchProgram href "../ResearchProgram/"
      NamedThing <|-- ResearchProgram
        click NamedThing href "../NamedThing/"


      ResearchProgram <|-- BioenergyResearchCenter
        click BioenergyResearchCenter href "../BioenergyResearchCenter/"
      ResearchProgram <|-- ScientificFocusArea
        click ScientificFocusArea href "../ScientificFocusArea/"
      ResearchProgram <|-- OtherProgram
        click OtherProgram href "../OtherProgram/"


      ResearchProgram : acronym

      ResearchProgram : analyses





        ResearchProgram --> "*" KBaseNarrative : analyses
        click KBaseNarrative href "../KBaseNarrative/"

        click DataType href "../DataType/"

        click IsolateCollection href "../IsolateCollection/"



      ResearchProgram : kbase_genome_collection





        ResearchProgram --> "0..1" KBaseCollection : kbase_genome_collection
        click KBaseCollection href "../KBaseCollection/"



      ResearchProgram : key_publications





        ResearchProgram --> "*" Reference : key_publications
        click Reference href "../Reference/"



      ResearchProgram : keywords





        ResearchProgram --> "*" Keyword : keywords
        click Keyword href "../Keyword/"



      ResearchProgram : lead_institution

      ResearchProgram : location





        ResearchProgram --> "0..1" Location : location
        click Location href "../Location/"



      ResearchProgram : name

docs.title: Class: ScientificFocusArea
docs.text:
A DOE Scientific Focus Area (SFA). SFAs are integrated research programs at DOE national laboratories focused on specific scientific areas within BER's portfolio. SFAs conduct coordinated, team-oriented research taking advantage of national laboratory strengths.

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:ScientificFocusArea

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: ScientificFocusArea
description: A DOE Scientific Focus Area (SFA). SFAs are integrated research programs
  at DOE national laboratories focused on specific scientific areas within BER's portfolio.
  SFAs conduct coordinated, team-oriented research taking advantage of national laboratory
  strengths.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
is_a: ResearchProgram
slot_usage:
  program_type:
    name: program_type
    ifabsent: string(SCIENTIFIC_FOCUS_AREA)
attributes:
  sfa_type:
    name: sfa_type
    description: The specific type of Scientific Focus Area
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: sfa_type
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ScientificFocusArea
    range: SFAType
  technologies_developed:
    name: technologies_developed
    description: Technologies or tools developed by the program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: technologies_developed
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ScientificFocusArea
    range: Technology
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  co_investigators:
    name: co_investigators
    description: Co-investigators on the program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: co_investigators
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ScientificFocusArea
    range: Person
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  acronym:
    name: acronym
    description: Short acronym or abbreviation for the program (e.g., GLBRC, ENIGMA)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:alternateName
    alias: acronym
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - UserFacility
    range: string
  program_type:
    name: program_type
    description: The type of research program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    ifabsent: string(SCIENTIFIC_FOCUS_AREA)
    alias: program_type
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - UserFacility
    range: ProgramType
  start_date:
    name: start_date
    description: Date or year when the program started. Prefer ISO 8601 dates when
      known; use a year-only value when the exact date is not known.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: start_date
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - UserFacility
    range: string
  end_date:
    name: end_date
    description: Date or year when the program ended. Leave empty for ongoing programs.
      Prefer ISO 8601 dates when known; use a year-only value when the exact date
      is not known.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: end_date
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - UserFacility
    range: string
  lead_institution:
    name: lead_institution
    description: The primary institution leading the program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: lead_institution
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - UserFacility
    range: string
  partner_institutions:
    name: partner_institutions
    description: Partner institutions participating in the program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: partner_institutions
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  principal_investigators:
    name: principal_investigators
    description: Principal investigators leading the program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: principal_investigators
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: Person
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  funding:
    name: funding
    description: Funding information for the program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: funding
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - UserFacility
    range: FundingInfo
  location:
    name: location
    description: Geographic location of the program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: location
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - FieldSite
    range: Location
  websites:
    name: websites
    description: Web resources associated with the program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: websites
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - UserFacility
    range: WebResources
  scientific_questions:
    name: scientific_questions
    description: Key scientific questions addressed by the program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: scientific_questions
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  keywords:
    name: keywords
    description: Keywords describing the research focus
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:keywords
    alias: keywords
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: Keyword
    multivalued: true
  data_types:
    name: data_types
    description: Types of data collected or generated
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: data_types
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: DataType
    multivalued: true
  data_collection_modalities:
    name: data_collection_modalities
    description: Methods and modalities used for data collection
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: data_collection_modalities
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: DataCollectionModality
    multivalued: true
  interaction_types:
    name: interaction_types
    description: Types of microbial interactions studied (e.g., mutualism, antagonism,
      competition)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: interaction_types
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - Dataset
    range: InteractionType
    multivalued: true
  interaction_modes:
    name: interaction_modes
    description: Physical or chemical modes of microbial interaction (e.g., endohyphal,
      siderophore-mediated)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: interaction_modes
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - Dataset
    range: InteractionMode
    multivalued: true
  nmdc_umbrella_study:
    name: nmdc_umbrella_study
    description: The NMDC umbrella study identifier for this research program. This
      is the top-level study that child studies link to via part_of.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: nmdc_umbrella_study
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: uriorcurie
    pattern: ^nmdc:sty-[a-z0-9-]+$
  studies:
    name: studies
    description: NMDC studies associated with this research program. These are individual
      research studies that are part of the program.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: studies
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: NMDCStudyReference
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  analyses:
    name: analyses
    description: Computational analyses associated with this research program, including
      KBase narratives and other workflows.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: analyses
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: KBaseNarrative
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  kbase_genome_collection:
    name: kbase_genome_collection
    description: If this program has a curated genome collection in KBase Collections
      (e.g., ENIGMA, PMI, GROW), the collection identifier. Collections are searchable
      curated datasets with GTDB taxonomy and microTrait annotations.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: kbase_genome_collection
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: KBaseCollection
  datasets:
    name: datasets
    description: Datasets produced by or associated with the program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: datasets
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: Dataset
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  field_site_ids:
    name: field_site_ids
    description: Identifiers of canonical field sites associated with the program
      or study. These reference entries in the top-level sites collection.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: field_site_ids
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    - NMDCStudyReference
    range: uriorcurie
    multivalued: true
  key_publications:
    name: key_publications
    description: Key publications from the program with their findings
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: key_publications
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: Reference
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  established:
    name: established
    description: Year the program was established
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: established
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: integer
  collaborators:
    name: collaborators
    description: Description of collaborators
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: collaborators
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: string
  isolate_collections:
    name: isolate_collections
    description: Microbial isolate collections maintained by this research program.
      Provides catalog-level information about available cultures and genomes.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: isolate_collections
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: IsolateCollection
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  phenotype_assays:
    name: phenotype_assays
    description: Types of phenotype assays performed by this research program. Catalogs
      the phenotyping capabilities and data types generated.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    alias: phenotype_assays
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - ResearchProgram
    range: PhenotypeAssayType
    multivalued: true
  id:
    name: id
    description: A unique identifier for the research program (e.g., nmdc_sfas_brcs:glbrc)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:identifier
    identifier: true
    alias: id
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - NamedThing
    - OntologyTerm
    - Reference
    range: uriorcurie
    required: true
    pattern: ^([a-z][a-z0-9_]*:)?[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$
  name:
    name: name
    description: The full official name of the research program
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:name
    alias: name
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - NamedThing
    - Institution
    - Person
    - Dataset
    - Variable
    - IsolateCollection
    - Technology
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - FlagshipGenome
    - Capability
    - Instrument
    range: string
    required: true
  description:
    name: description
    description: A human-readable description for an entity
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:description
    alias: description
    owner: ScientificFocusArea
    domain_of:
    - NamedThing
    - Institution
    - Dataset
    - Variable
    - IsolateCollection
    - Technology
    - StudyDesign
    - NMDCStudyReference
    - FlagshipGenome
    - Capability
    - Instrument
    range: string

docs.title: Class: StudyDesign
docs.text:
Study-level design metadata that applies across variables and datasets. This captures the design pattern, experimental or observational units, replication, blocking, randomization, and related notes separately from the data dictionary entries for individual variables.

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:StudyDesign

 classDiagram
    class StudyDesign
    click StudyDesign href "../StudyDesign/"
      StudyDesign : blocking

      StudyDesign : controls

      StudyDesign : description

      StudyDesign : design_types





        StudyDesign --> "*" OntologyTerm : design_types
        click OntologyTerm href "../OntologyTerm/"



      StudyDesign : experimental_units

      StudyDesign : notes

      StudyDesign : observational_units

      StudyDesign : randomization

      StudyDesign : replication

      StudyDesign : sampling_strategy

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance description 0..1  String A human-readable description for an entity direct design_types *  OntologyTerm OBI or related ontology terms describing the study design direct experimental_units *  String Units assigned to treatments or interventions direct observational_units *  String Units on which measurements are made direct sampling_strategy 0..1  String Sampling strategy or sampling design used by the study direct replication 0..1  String Description of biological, technical, field, or model replication direct randomization 0..1  String Description of randomization, if used direct blocking 0..1  String Description of blocking or stratification, if used direct controls 0..1  String Description of control groups, baselines, or reference conditions direct notes 0..1  String Additional notes about the study design direct

docs.title: Usages
docs.text: used by used in type used NMDCStudyReference study_design range StudyDesign

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

docs.title: Mappings
docs.text: Mapping Type Mapped Value self nmdc_sfas_brcs:StudyDesign native nmdc_sfas_brcs:StudyDesign

docs.title: Direct
docs.text:
name: StudyDesign
description: Study-level design metadata that applies across variables and datasets.
  This captures the design pattern, experimental or observational units, replication,
  blocking, randomization, and related notes separately from the data dictionary entries
  for individual variables.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
slots:
- description
attributes:
  design_types:
    name: design_types
    description: OBI or related ontology terms describing the study design
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - StudyDesign
    range: OntologyTerm
    bindings:
    - range: StudyDesignTerm
      obligation_level: RECOMMENDED
      binds_value_of: id
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  experimental_units:
    name: experimental_units
    description: Units assigned to treatments or interventions
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - StudyDesign
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  observational_units:
    name: observational_units
    description: Units on which measurements are made
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - StudyDesign
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  sampling_strategy:
    name: sampling_strategy
    description: Sampling strategy or sampling design used by the study
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - StudyDesign
    range: string
  replication:
    name: replication
    description: Description of biological, technical, field, or model replication
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - StudyDesign
    range: string
  randomization:
    name: randomization
    description: Description of randomization, if used
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - StudyDesign
    range: string
  blocking:
    name: blocking
    description: Description of blocking or stratification, if used
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - StudyDesign
    range: string
  controls:
    name: controls
    description: Description of control groups, baselines, or reference conditions
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - StudyDesign
    range: string
  notes:
    name: notes
    description: Additional notes about the study design
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    domain_of:
    - CollectionMetadata
    - Variable
    - StudyDesign
    range: string

docs.title: Class: Variable
docs.text:
A variable, factor, measurement, or metadata field observed, manipulated, derived, or otherwise used in a study or dataset. Variables act as a lightweight data dictionary and can be tagged with analytical roles, time-series behavior, units, methods, and ontology mappings such as BERVO. Ontology references are modeled as id/label objects so linkml-term-validator can check both the identifier and the canonical label.

URI: schema:PropertyValue

 classDiagram
    class Variable
    click Variable href "../Variable/"
      Variable : bervo_term





        Variable --> "0..1" BERVOTerm : bervo_term
        click BERVOTerm href "../BERVOTerm/"



      Variable : description

      Variable : levels

      Variable : material_or_matrix

      Variable : measured_entity

      Variable : method

      Variable : mixs_terms





        Variable --> "*" MIXSTerm : mixs_terms
        click MIXSTerm href "../MIXSTerm/"



      Variable : name

      Variable : notes

      Variable : ontology_mappings





        Variable --> "*" OntologyTerm : ontology_mappings
        click OntologyTerm href "../OntologyTerm/"



      Variable : roles





        Variable --> "*" VariableRole : roles
        click VariableRole href "../VariableRole/"



      Variable : source_field_names

      Variable : spatial_resolution

      Variable : temporal_resolution

      Variable : time_series

      Variable : unit_term





        Variable --> "0..1" OntologyTerm : unit_term
        click OntologyTerm href "../OntologyTerm/"



      Variable : units

      Variable : value_type





        Variable --> "0..1" VariableValueType : value_type
        click VariableValueType href "../VariableValueType/"
