docs.title: Direct
docs.text:
name: Variable
description: A variable, factor, measurement, or metadata field observed, manipulated,
  derived, or otherwise used in a study or dataset. Variables act as a lightweight
  data dictionary and can be tagged with analytical roles, time-series behavior, units,
  methods, and ontology mappings such as BERVO. Ontology references are modeled as
  id/label objects so linkml-term-validator can check both the identifier and the
  canonical label.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
slots:
- name
- description
slot_usage:
  name:
    name: name
    description: Human-readable variable name or label used in the study or dataset
    required: true
attributes:
  roles:
    name: roles
    description: Roles this variable plays in the study design or analysis. Multiple
      roles are allowed; for example, drought treatment may be both EXPERIMENTAL_FACTOR
      and STUDY_DESIGN_INDEPENDENT_VARIABLE.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: VariableRole
    multivalued: true
  value_type:
    name: value_type
    description: Basic type or shape of values recorded for this variable
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: VariableValueType
  units:
    name: units
    description: Human-readable units for quantitative variables
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
  unit_term:
    name: unit_term
    description: Unit ontology term, if available
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: OntologyTerm
    inlined: true
  bervo_term:
    name: bervo_term
    description: Primary BERVO class mapping for this variable, when available
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: BERVOTerm
    inlined: true
  mixs_terms:
    name: mixs_terms
    description: MIxS metadata terms corresponding to this variable, when the variable
      represents a MIxS sample, environmental, host, or sequencing metadata field.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: MIXSTerm
    bindings:
    - range: MIXSVariableTerm
      obligation_level: RECOMMENDED
      binds_value_of: id
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  ontology_mappings:
    name: ontology_mappings
    description: Additional ontology mappings for this variable, including ENVO, PATO,
      UO, OBI, or other relevant controlled vocabularies. Statistical or study-design
      roles should generally be represented in the roles slot rather than repeated
      here.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: OntologyTerm
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  measured_entity:
    name: measured_entity
    description: Entity, organism, environmental feature, process, or system being
      measured or manipulated by this variable.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
  material_or_matrix:
    name: material_or_matrix
    description: Material, sample matrix, compartment, or context for the variable
      (e.g., soil, rhizosphere, leaf tissue, porewater, bioreactor culture).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
  method:
    name: method
    description: Measurement, manipulation, or derivation method
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
  time_series:
    name: time_series
    description: True when values for this variable are captured repeatedly through
      time
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: boolean
  temporal_resolution:
    name: temporal_resolution
    description: Temporal grain or sampling interval for time-series variables
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
  spatial_resolution:
    name: spatial_resolution
    description: Spatial grain, support, or resolution for spatial variables
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
  levels:
    name: levels
    description: Known categorical levels, treatment levels, bins, or allowed values
      for this variable.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  source_field_names:
    name: source_field_names
    description: Column names, file field names, or source labels that map to this
      variable
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  notes:
    name: notes
    description: Additional notes about the variable definition or usage
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
    domain_of:
    - CollectionMetadata
    - Variable
    - StudyDesign
    range: string

docs.title: Enum: VariableRole
docs.text:
Roles that a variable can play in a study design, dataset, or analysis. Where possible, roles are aligned to OBI, STATO, or EFO terms. Use the narrower study-design roles when the variable's role is known from the experimental design; use MEASURED_VARIABLE for observed data fields when no dependent/independent interpretation is intended.

URI: nmdc_sfas_brcs:VariableRole

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description STUDY_DESIGN_INDEPENDENT_VARIABLE OBI:0000750 Study design variable that is varied, selected, or otherwise used to explain ... STUDY_DESIGN_DEPENDENT_VARIABLE OBI:0000751 Study design variable whose value is expected to vary as a result of other va... STUDY_DESIGN_CONTROLLED_VARIABLE OBI:0000785 Study design variable held constant or constrained by the study design EXPERIMENTAL_FACTOR EFO:0000001 Variable representing an experimental factor or condition BLOCKING_VARIABLE STATO:0000248 Variable used to form blocks or strata in a study design or analysis MEASURED_VARIABLE None Directly observed or measured variable COVARIATE None Additional contextual or adjustment variable included in an analysis DERIVED None Variable computed, transformed, or inferred from other variables DATE_TIME_VARIABLE STATO:0000729 Variable whose values represent dates or times TIME_TO_EVENT_VARIABLE STATO:0000731 Variable whose values represent elapsed time until an event SPATIAL_INDEX None Location, plot, coordinate, depth, transect, or other spatial index GROUPING None Replicate group, block, batch, genotype group, or other grouping variable IDENTIFIER None Sample, subject, feature, file, or other identifier field QUALITY_CONTROL None Quality flag, censoring flag, uncertainty estimate, or QC metric

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description roles Roles this variable plays in the study design or analysis

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs

docs.text:
name: VariableRole
description: Roles that a variable can play in a study design, dataset, or analysis.
  Where possible, roles are aligned to OBI, STATO, or EFO terms. Use the narrower
  study-design roles when the variable's role is known from the experimental design;
  use MEASURED_VARIABLE for observed data fields when no dependent/independent interpretation
  is intended.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nmdc/sfas-brcs
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  STUDY_DESIGN_INDEPENDENT_VARIABLE:
    text: STUDY_DESIGN_INDEPENDENT_VARIABLE
    description: Study design variable that is varied, selected, or otherwise used
      to explain or predict changes in another variable.
    meaning: OBI:0000750
    title: study design independent variable
    aliases:
    - independent variable
    - predictor variable
    - explanatory variable
  STUDY_DESIGN_DEPENDENT_VARIABLE:
    text: STUDY_DESIGN_DEPENDENT_VARIABLE
    description: Study design variable whose value is expected to vary as a result
      of other variables.
    meaning: OBI:0000751
    title: study design dependent variable
    aliases:
    - dependent variable
    - response variable
    - outcome variable
  STUDY_DESIGN_CONTROLLED_VARIABLE:
    text: STUDY_DESIGN_CONTROLLED_VARIABLE
    description: Study design variable held constant or constrained by the study design.
    meaning: OBI:0000785
    title: study design controlled variable
    aliases:
    - controlled variable
    - control variable
  EXPERIMENTAL_FACTOR:
    text: EXPERIMENTAL_FACTOR
    description: Variable representing an experimental factor or condition.
    meaning: EFO:0000001
    title: experimental factor
  BLOCKING_VARIABLE:
    text: BLOCKING_VARIABLE
    description: Variable used to form blocks or strata in a study design or analysis.
    meaning: STATO:0000248
    title: blocking variable
  MEASURED_VARIABLE:
    text: MEASURED_VARIABLE
    description: Directly observed or measured variable.
  COVARIATE:
    text: COVARIATE
    description: Additional contextual or adjustment variable included in an analysis.
  DERIVED:
    text: DERIVED
    description: Variable computed, transformed, or inferred from other variables
  DATE_TIME_VARIABLE:
    text: DATE_TIME_VARIABLE
    description: Variable whose values represent dates or times.
    meaning: STATO:0000729
    title: date Time variable
    aliases:
    - time variable
    - date time variable
  TIME_TO_EVENT_VARIABLE:
    text: TIME_TO_EVENT_VARIABLE
    description: Variable whose values represent elapsed time until an event.
    meaning: STATO:0000731
    title: time-to-event variable
  SPATIAL_INDEX:
    text: SPATIAL_INDEX
    description: Location, plot, coordinate, depth, transect, or other spatial index
  GROUPING:
    text: GROUPING
    description: Replicate group, block, batch, genotype group, or other grouping
      variable
  IDENTIFIER:
    text: IDENTIFIER
    description: Sample, subject, feature, file, or other identifier field
  QUALITY_CONTROL:
    text: QUALITY_CONTROL
    description: Quality flag, censoring flag, uncertainty estimate, or QC metric
